name: Rigetti Computing, Inc.
summary: Rigetti Computing, Inc. is a quantum computing company that designs and manufactures superconducting quantum processors and provides quantum computing access via cloud-based Quantum Computing as a Service (QCaaS). The company develops full-stack quantum computing systems, including hardware and software, and offers access through cloud providers. Rigetti serves government and commercial customers, with a significant portion of revenue derived from public sector contracts.

products.name: Superconducting Quantum Processors
products.description: Quantum processors based on superconducting modality featuring open modular architecture designed for scalability and fast gate speeds.

products.name: Quantum Computing as a Service (QCaaS)
products.description: Cloud-based access to Rigetti quantum computing systems provided through cloud provider partnerships.

partnerships.description: Collaboration Agreement with Quanta, a Taiwan Corporation, for quantum computing development.
Relationships with cloud providers to deliver QCaaS to customers.
